backward_compatibility.rationale: User confirmed: no backward compatibility. Shards are deleted entirely. Published files can be republished.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Complete shard system removal: shard_writer.py, shard_key.py, shard_models.py, snapshot directories, queryPlanner.ts, shardPageLoader.ts, snapshotService.ts shard logic

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous governance approval. Frontend-led approach: sample DB seed → frontend sql.js → backend pipeline → shard deletion. Matches user's stated preference.
